title: Free Place
description: This mod just allows to place any item anywhere in world without any boundaries
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Free_Place/BH_Free_Place_header.webp)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Free_Place/BH_Free_Place_description.webp)

It's a simple mod that allows you to place any item in the world like item frame but without any boundaries with "G" keybind and picking them up with right click when placed down

As also it has few extra keybinds that allow you to change roll, pitch, scale and height of item model that you placed(when you press them when crouching they will reverse those):

"B" - Model height (might be useful when placing 3d items like trident or shield)

"J" - Pitch

"H" - Roll

"K" - Scale

"N" - Reset to normal values

That's all that this mod does! Simple yet sometimes needed!

***

Also please be aware that with Carry On mod it can have some issues so please add minecraft:item_display and minecraft:interaction to the exceptions in config if you will be using both of those mods!

***
